name: Kilograms to Pounds Converter
description: Industrial-grade mass conversion tool with precision validation, loss analysis, and confidence-adjusted outputs compliant with ISO 80000-1 and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Mass in Kilograms
inputs.businessContext: Input mass value in kilograms for conversion to pounds. Used in logistics, manufacturing, and trade.

businessContext_i18n.en: Input mass value in kilograms for conversion to pounds. Used in logistics, manufacturing, and trade.

inputs.label: Precision Level
inputs.businessContext: Select number of decimal places for output rounding, per ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select number of decimal places for output rounding, per ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

inputs.label: Use Industry Rounding (WERC)
inputs.businessContext: Apply WERC standard rounding (0.5 up) for trade compliance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Apply WERC standard rounding (0.5 up) for trade compliance.

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty (%)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated uncertainty in the input measurement, used for confidence adjustment (ISO/IEC Guide 98-3).

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated uncertainty in the input measurement, used for confidence adjustment (ISO/IEC Guide 98-3).

rules.message: Mass exceeds maximum allowed value (1,000,000 kg).
Measurement uncertainty must be between 0% and 10%.
Precision level must be an integer from 0 to 6.

thresholds.message: Mass exceeds 50,000 kg; verify handling capacity.
Measurement uncertainty >5%; results may be unreliable.

formulas.name: Rounding Application
formulas.description: Apply rounding based on precision level and industry standard.
formulas.equation: IF use_industry_rounding THEN rounded_lb = ROUND_HALF_UP(raw_lb, precision_level) ELSE rounded_lb = ROUND_HALF_EVEN(raw_lb, precision_level)

formulas.name: Uncertainty Adjustment
formulas.description: Adjust output for measurement uncertainty (coverage factor k=2 for 95% confidence).

formulas.name: Data Confidence Score
formulas.description: Normalized confidence score (0-1) based on uncertainty.

formulas.name: Primary Result (Adjusted Mass in lb)
formulas.description: Final output: rounded value with confidence adjustment factor applied for conservative estimate.

primary.label: Adjusted Mass (lb)
primary.description: Primary converted mass in pounds, adjusted for measurement uncertainty (conservative estimate).

breakdown.label: Conversion Breakdown
breakdown.description: Detailed component values of the conversion process.

rounded_lb.label: Rounded Pounds
rounded_lb.description: Rounded conversion result per selected precision.

confidence_score.label: Data Confidence Score
confidence_score.description: Normalized confidence score based on uncertainty.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Rounding Loss
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Difference between raw and rounded value due to precision truncation.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Uncertainty Loss
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Reduction applied to primary result due to measurement uncertainty.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Non-Compliance Risk
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Potential discrepancy if industry rounding is not used (WERC standard).

suggestedActions.label: Verify Input Mass
suggestedActions.description: If mass > 50,000 kg, confirm with calibrated scale (ISO 17025).

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Measurement Uncertainty
suggestedActions.description: If uncertainty > 5%, recalibrate equipment or use multiple measurements.

suggestedActions.label: Enable Industry Rounding
suggestedActions.description: For trade compliance, ensure WERC rounding is active.

suggestedActions.label: Export Full Report
suggestedActions.description: Use premium feature to export PDF/CSV for audit trail.
